# Tour de Fore

> AI golf trip planner with 1,400+ destination guides covering bachelor parties, buddies trips, and golf vacations across the US.

Tour de Fore generates personalized golf trip itineraries with real courses, lodging, dining, and budgets. The free AI engine collects detailed inputs (group size, skill level, budget, vibe, party type) and produces three-tier plans. Includes a pro shop with custom golf apparel via Printful dropship.

## Key pages
- [Plan a Trip](https://tourdefore.com/plan): The free AI golf trip planner
- [Golf Trips](https://tourdefore.com/golf-trips): Full destination directory
- [Pro Shop](https://tourdefore.com/shop): Custom golf apparel
- [Concierge](https://tourdefore.com/concierge): Full-service trip planning

## Destination structure
Tour de Fore organizes destinations as `/golf-trips/[city]/[party-type]` — e.g. `/golf-trips/scottsdale-az/bachelor-party`, `/golf-trips/phoenix-mesa-az/buddies-trip`. Each page is a full itinerary with courses, lodging, dining, and budget for that specific city and party type.

## Optional
- [Sitemap Index](https://tourdefore.com/sitemap.xml)
